title.ko: 압연 이외의 방법으로 금속 판재, 선재, 봉재, 관재, 프로파일 또는 이와 유사한 반제품을 제조하는 것; 금속 가공과 관련하여 재료를 본질적으로 제거하지 않고 사용되는 보조 작업
title.en: MANUFACTURE OF METAL SHEETS, WIRE, RODS, TUBES, PROFILES OR LIKE SEMI-MANUFACTURED PRODUCTS OTHERWISE THAN BY ROLLING; AUXILIARY OPERATIONS USED IN CONNECTION WITH METAL-WORKING WITHOUT ESSENTIALLY REMOVING MATERIAL

definition.ko: 금속의 인발 일반적방법 B21C1/00 보조적 작업 B21C5/00, B21C9/00 장치 B21C3/00, B21C19/00 금속의 압출 일반적방법 B21C23/00 보조적 작업 B21C29/00, B21C33/00, B21C35/00 장치 B21C25/00, B21C26/00, B21C27/00 제어 B21C31/00 금속의 인발 및 압출에 공통된 세부 B21C43/00 실질적으로 재료의 제거없이 금속가공과 결합해서 사용하는 보조적 및 부수적작업 권취 B21C37/00 다른 보조 작업 B21C47/00 보조장치 B21C45/00, B21C51/00

title.ko: 인발에 의한 금속 판재, 선재, 봉재, 관재 또는 기타 반제품의 제조
title.en: Metal drawing

title.ko: 인발에 의한 금속 판재, 선재, 봉재, 관재 또는 기타 반제품의 제조
title.en: Manufacture of metal sheets, wire, rods, tubes or like semi-manufactured products by drawing
Drawing metal wire or like flexible metallic material by drawing machines or apparatus in which the drawing action is effected by drums
with two or more dies operating in series
in which the material slips on the drums
in which the material does not slip on the drums
with accumulation of material between consecutively-arranged dies
Regulating or controlling speed of drawing drums, e.g. to influence tension; Drives; Stop or relief mechanisms
Drums, e.g. capstans; Connection of grippers thereto; Grippers specially adapted for drawing machines or apparatus of the drum type; Couplings specially adapted for these drums

title.ko: 드럼 이외의 수단에 의해 인발 동작이 이루어지는 기계 또는 장치에 의한 금속 인발, 예. 금속 판재, 봉재 또는 관재를 만들기 위해 작업물이나 재료를 당기거나 밀어내는 세로 방향으로 이동하는 이송대에 의한 것
title.en: Metal drawing by machines or apparatus in which the drawing action is effected by means other than drums, e.g. by a longitudinally-moved carriage pulling or pushing the work or stock for making metal sheets, rods or tubes

title.ko: 한정된 길이의 스토크(물품)로부터의 것(B21C 1/22가 우선)
title.en: from stock of limited length (B21C0001220000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 실질적으로 무제한 길이의 스토크(물품)로부터의 것(B21C 1/22가 우선)
title.en: from stock of essentially unlimited length (B21C0001220000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 관상물품의 제조에 특히 적합한 것(인발에 의하여 관상으로 성형하는 금속판의 굽힘가공 B21D 5/10)
title.en: specially adapted for making tubular articles (bending sheet metal into tubular form by drawing B21D0005100000)
by means of mandrels
Push-bench drawing
Carriages; Drives
Carriages; Connections of grippers thereto; Grippers
Drives, e.g. carriage-traversing mechanisms; Driving elements, e.g. drawing chains; Controlling the drive
Feeding or discharging the material or mandrels
Guiding or supporting the material or mandrels

title.ko: 금속 인발용 프로파일링 공구; 금속 인발용 다이와 맨드릴의 조합
title.en: Profiling tools for metal drawing; Combinations of dies and mandrels for metal drawing

title.en: Dies; Selection of material therefor; Cleaning thereof

title.ko: 비조정단면을 갖는 것(B21C 3/08이 우선)

with section defined by rollers, balls, or the like
with hydraulic forces acting immediately on work

Die holders combined with devices for guiding the drawing material or combined with devices for cooling, heating, or lubricating

Making tools by operations not covered by a single other subclass; Repairing
Pointing or push-pointing drawn work or drawing material

title.ko: 인발재료의 냉각, 가열 또는 윤활(B21C 3/14가 우선)
title.en: Cooling, heating or lubricating drawing material (B21C0003140000 takes precedence)
Selection of compositions therefor
Devices for straightening wire or like work combined with or specially adapted for use in connection with drawing or winding machines or apparatus

title.ko: 금속의 압출 충격압출
title.en: Metal extruding

title.ko: 금속의 압출 충격압출
title.en: Extruding metal; Impact extrusion

title.ko: 특유한 형 또는 형상의 재료에서의 출발, 예. 기계적으로 예비처리한 것(B21C 23/22가 우선)
title.en: starting from material of particular form or shape, e.g. mechanically pre-treated  (B21C0023220000 takes precedence)
Making uncoated products
by both direct and backward extrusion
by direct extrusion
Making sheets
Making wire, rods or tubes

Extruding bent tubes or rods
Making other products
Making turbo blades or propellers
by impact extrusion
by backward extrusion
Presses specially adapted for extruding metal
Making metal-coated products; Making products from two or more metals
Covering indefinite lengths of metal or non-metal material with a metal coating
Applying metal coats to cables, e.g. to insulated electric cables

on continuously-operating extrusion presses

title.ko: 금속의 압출용 (프로파일링 공구, 성형 공구)

Dies
Mandrels
Press heads, dies, or mandrels for coating work

title.ko: 압출중에 단면이 변화하는 다이스 또는 맨드릴, 예. 테이퍼 가공품의 제조를 위한 것; 변화의 제어
title.en: Dies or mandrels with section variable during extruding, e. g for making tapered work; Controlling variation
Making tools by operations not covered by a single other subclass
Rams or plungers for metal extruding; Discs therefor

title.ko: 압출금속을 위한 용기(Container) (B21C 29/02가 우선)
title.en: Containers for metal to be extruded (B21C0029020000 takes precedence)
for making coated work
Venting metal-container chamber
Cooling or heating extruded work or parts of the extrusion press

title.ko: 금속 압출용 제어 장치, 예. 금속의 프레스 속도 또는 온도 조절용 (B21C25/08이 우선); 측정 장치, 예. 압출프레스와 결합되었거나 이에 특히 적합한 금속의 온도 측정용의 것

the metal being in liquid form

title.ko: 압출프레스로부터 작업물 또는 폐기물의 제거; 압출된 작업물을 분리하는 것 (굽힘관 또는 봉의 압출과 관련된 것 B21C 23/12); 금속 압출용 다이, 덕트, 용기 또는 맨드릴의 세척
title.en: Removing work or waste from extruding presses; Drawing-off extruded work (in connection with the extruding of bent tubes or rods B21C0023120000); Cleaning dies, ducts, containers, or mandrels for metal extruding
Removing or drawing-off work

combined with or specially adapted for use in connection with drawing or winding machines or apparatus

title.en: Winding-up, coiling or winding-off metal wire, metal band or other flexible metal material characterised by features relevant to metal processing only (coiling wire into particular forms B21F0003000000)

title.ko: 권취 또는 코일링
title.en: Winding-up or coiling
on or in reels or drums, without using a moving guide
with loaded rollers, bolts, or equivalent means holding the material on the reel or drum
without making use of a reel or drum, the first turn being formed by a stationary guide

title.ko: 이동안내에 의한 것
title.en: by means of a moving guide

title.ko: 코일(Coil)의 축에 평행하게 이동하는 안내(B21C 47/14가 우선)
title.en: the guide moving parallel to the axis of the coil (B21C0047140000 takes precedence)
by means of a rotating guide, e.g. laying the material around a stationary reel or drum

Drums or other coil-holders
expansible or contractible
Tongs or gripping means specially adapted for reeling operations
Feeding or guiding devices not specially adapted to a particular type of apparatus

title.ko: 서브클래스 B21B~ B21F에 따르는 재료의 제조 또는 취급하는데 특히 적합한 측정, 계기, 표식, 계산 또는 표시하는 장치
title.en: Measuring, gauging, indicating, counting, or marking devices specially adapted for use in the production or manipulation of material in accordance with subclasses B21B-B21F
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
